meaning: n.迦南(巴勒斯坦北部一村庄)
examples: At the wedding in Cana the servants faithfully acted on the Lord's instructions.
The largest painting on display at the Louvre is The Wedding Feast at Cana, painted by Paolo Veronese in 1563.
In 2005 he represented Cana Investments LLC in something that struck me as a fight over scraps.
Bruce has made Cattermole his fifth summer signing following Darren Bent, Lorik Cana, Fraizer Campbell and Paulo Da Silva to the Stadium of Light.
